source_pr.title: executor: fix data race.
source_pr.body:
remove useless test to fix race.
@shenli @tiancaiamao PTAL

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under the race detector due to a data race triggered by executing redundant UNION statements in `TestUnion`. This PR stabilizes the test by removing the unnecessary UNION SELECT executions (keeps only the essential setup), reducing exposure to the racy path.
fix_pattern: Remove redundant/racy SQL executions from tests; avoid running UNION/SELECT via `MustExec` without assertions (prefer `MustQuery`+Check when needed).
analysis:
